message.description: Your response to the staff member, written in a plain and warm tone of voice. It may contain one question at most. If and only if you are seeking final confirmation, it must start with "here's what I have for this section."

suggestions.description: A list of the ID numbers of the most genuinely helpful data points from the batch provided, most genuinely helpful first.

is_sufficient.description: True if and only if you have received final confirmation from the staff member; false if not.
